hero_subtitle: SFTY helps compliance teams consolidate provider data, maintain audit evidence, and structure case workflows to efficiently assemble regulatory inspection response packages.
trust_card_1_value: Identity checks connected to onboarding decisions
trust_card_2_value: Corporate verification, UBO review and entity risk
trust_card_3_value: Wallet and transaction monitoring in one workflow
trust_card_4_value: Message routing, completeness checks and exception handling
trust_card_5_value: Regulatory changes mapped to internal rule
trust_card_6_value: Decision logs and evidence for every review
problem_title: Inspection readiness falters with scattered evidence
problem_description: Compliance teams struggle to assemble complete, audit-ready packages when case data and provider outputs remain disconnected across multiple tools. This fragmentation slows responses to regulatory inspection requests and complicates the preparation of defensible reports and evidence.
problem_point_1_value: KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule outputs sit in separate tools
problem_point_2_value: Teams move data between dashboards, spreadsheets and internal notes
problem_point_3_value: Regulatory changes are hard to map into internal workflows
problem_point_4_value: Evidence and decision history are difficult to reconstruct later
solution_description: SFTY connects case data, provider outputs, reviewer actions and regulatory reports into a unified evidence layer that streamlines the preparation of comprehensive inspection response packages.
workflow_title: From case creation to inspection report
workflow_description: SFTY structures alerts, provider checks and review actions into documented cases that preserve evidence and prepare regulatory inspection response packages.
workflow_step_1_description: KYC, KYB, KYT and screening outputs enter SFTY
workflow_step_2_description: Risk rules route checks into the right workflow
workflow_step_3_description: A case opens with customer, wallet and provider context
workflow_step_4_description: Teams review, decide and record the outcome
workflow_step_5_description: Logs, decisions and reports stay ready for audit
why_sfty_description: SFTY connects fragmented provider outputs into structured cases, decision logs and audit evidence to support compliance teams preparing regulatory inspection response packages.
why_sfty_card_1_description: Work above existing KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule tools
why_sfty_card_2_description: Turn disconnected outputs into structured reviews and cases
why_sfty_card_3_description: Preserve evidence, reviewer actions and decision history
why_sfty_card_4_description: Give compliance, risk and leadership one operating view

authority_card_1_description: Connect KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers into one workflow

authority_card_3_description: Prepare clearer compliance evidence for banks, partners and external review

ask_sfty_helper_text: AI assistant for product, deployment and compliance questions
faq_description: Clear answers on provider orchestration, Travel Rule workflows, audit evidence and enterprise compliance operations.
faq_1_question: What is SFTY for compliance teams preparing inspections?
faq_1_answer: SFTY provides a connected compliance control layer that structures alerts, cases, evidence and reports to support VASP teams preparing regulatory inspection response packages.
faq_2_question: How does SFTY manage regulatory inspection cases?
faq_2_answer: SFTY connects provider outputs into structured workflows, enabling case creation, decision logging, escalation and evidence collection for thorough inspection responses.
faq_3_question: How does SFTY preserve audit-ready compliance evidence?
faq_3_answer: SFTY preserves decision logs, case history and supporting evidence with audit logs, supporting compliance activities are defensible and review-ready for regulators.
faq_4_question: Can SFTY integrate with existing compliance providers?
faq_4_answer: Yes. SFTY sits above KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers, connecting their outputs into one integrated compliance operating system without replacing them.
faq_5_question: Does SFTY replace our underlying compliance providers?
faq_5_answer: No. SFTY does not replace providers but structures their outputs into one operational workflow for consistent review, regulatory rule updates, evidence and reporting.
final_title: Structure regulatory inspection cases with SFTY
final_description: Review how SFTY connects provider outputs, case workflows and audit-ready evidence for efficient inspection response packages.
